phrases.text: Feel the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair
How to instantly freeze time
Remember determined eyes gazing at me

Facing the vast sea of stars we're as tiny as dust

Fate brought us together outside the chaotic world
we fall in love amidst peril
Perhaps the future lies far beyond light years away
willing to wait for you in unknown
I never expected I go so mad for you mountains
Without you my mind refuses to flee
For you I've gone so crazy that without you my pulse and heartbeat
simply don't matter at all
pair of arms wrapped around my chest
is enough to withstand dizzying spin
stubborn obsession of refusing to let go enough
ignite all hope
universe vast indifferent our love tiny yet shimmering
turbulent yet so utterly absorbed
Destiny brought us together outside chaotic world
we fall in love amidst danger

willing to wait for you in unknown

dream I can't wake from in chaotic world
